title: Parent Resident Visa Expression of Interest form | Immigration New Zealand
content:
Check the criteria and evidence requirements to see if you are eligible to submit a Parent Resident Visa Expression of Interest (EOI).
Parent Resident Visa

## Complete or save the form
Enter your details, or the details of the person you are submitting on behalf of.
You do not have to complete this form all at once. You can save what you have done at any time and come back later.
If you would like to print a copy of your EOI, right-click and select print. Select 'save as PDF' as the destination to save a copy to your device. You can only print a copy before you submit your form.
To submit your EOI to the ballot, complete the form, select 'submit' and pay the fee.
You must pay the fee when you submit your EOI. If you do not pay the fee within 7 days your EOI will not go into the Parent Category Resident Visa ballot. You will have to submit another one if you still want to enter the ballot.
Check the fee for you to submit an EOI into the Parent Category Resident Visa Ballot.
Fees, decision times and where to apply
After submitting your EOI, you can pay with a Visa or Mastercard debit or credit card.
You cannot complete this form using Internet Explorer. You can use Safari, Chrome, Firefox or Edge. Accessibility

## Check if this is the right form for you
Read this information carefully to avoid delays or unnecessary costs.
You can only have 1 active Expression of Interest (EOI) in the Parent Resident Visa ballot pool at any time.
- EOIs remain valid in the ballot pool for up to 2 years.
- If you are unsure if you already have an EOI in the pool, contact us before you submit a new EOI. Contact us
- If you need to make changes to an existing EOI, you can update or withdraw your EOI. Update or withdraw your Parent Resident Visa expression of interest (EOI)
If you submit a new EOI while you already have an EOI in the pool, the new EOI will be removed before the next draw.
The EOI fee is non-refundable.
After reviewing this information, consider if you want to continue with your submission.
